dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6360 IH: Growth, Energy, and National Excellence through Science, Innovation, and Security Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Kennedy of Utah introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology

form.official-title: To provide that the Executive order entitled Launching the Genesis Mission shall have the force and effect of law, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Growth, Energy, and National Excellence through Science, Innovation, and Security Act or the GENESIS Act.

Notwithstanding any other provision of law or Executive order, Executive Order 14363 (90 Fed. Reg. 55035), signed on November 24, 2025, and entitled “Launching the Genesis Mission”, shall have the force and effect of law.
